# Phase 12 — stall modifier post-pass. Exercises:
#   - stall-modifier-json directive
#   - Suppressed kind propagating through the pipeline and dropping
#     stalls from the total_stalls count
#   - SVG renderer skipping Suppressed stalls (visual verification via
#     the snapshot)

polygon outer
0,0
240,0
240,160
0,160
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

# Horizontal suppression line at mid-height of the lot. Should clear
# stalls along both sides of the interior aisle that runs east-west.
stall-modifier-json
[{"polyline":[{"x":40,"y":80},{"x":200,"y":80}],"kind":"Suppressed"}]
----
stall-modifier-json: +1

generate
----
total_stalls: 116

snapshot
----
